meta.title: NuxtHub × bunny.net Starter
meta.description: NuxtHub Full-Stack Ecosystem × bunny.net Infrastructure — The Ultimate Starter Template
meta.ogDescription: Deploy NuxtHub Full-Stack apps on bunny.net Magic Containers with maximum performance
meta.demoDescription: Interactive demo of NuxtHub server routes, authentication, and real-time WebSocket — all running live
meta.servicesDescription: 10 bunny.net services powering the NuxtHub full-stack starter — CDN, Storage, Database, and more
meta.ecosystemDescription: Nuxt modules, UnJS packages, and PWA capabilities powering this starter template
meta.studioDescription: Edit content with Nuxt Studio — visual Markdown editor powered by NuxtHub

hero.description: The ultimate full-stack starter — NuxtHub's Database, Blob, KV & Cache deployed on bunny.net Magic Containers with Bun runtime.

architecture.headline: Architecture
architecture.title: How NuxtHub maps to bunny.net
architecture.description: Zero-config data layer — each NuxtHub feature maps directly to a bunny.net service via UnJS drivers

liveDemo.headline: Live Demo
liveDemo.title: Server Routes in Action
liveDemo.description: NuxtHub server routes powered by Nitro — fetched in real-time from this running instance
liveDemo.visitHint: Record a page visit to the database using Drizzle ORM
liveDemo.uploadHint: Images, text, PDF, JSON — max 2 MB

studio.heroTitle: Edit your Nuxt Content website in production
studio.heroDescription: Self-hosted CMS for Nuxt Content websites. Edit content visually, manage media, and publish changes directly to Git from your production site.
studio.floatingButtonHint: Click the floating edit button at the bottom-left corner of this page, or press Ctrl + . to open the Studio editor.

auth.headline: Authentication
auth.title: Auth & Security
auth.description: Production-ready authentication with OAuth, sessions, and CSRF protection powered by nuxt-auth-utils
auth.guestMessage: Login with GitHub to test the OAuth flow and see your session data.
auth.protectedApiDesc: Try calling the protected endpoint to see session-based access control in action.
auth.oauthHint: Set NUXT_OAUTH_GITHUB_CLIENT_ID and NUXT_OAUTH_GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET in .env to enable GitHub login.

bunnyServices.title: 10 Services — Edge to Compute
bunnyServices.description: From CDN edge caching to bare-metal Magic Containers — the full bunny.net infrastructure

magicContainers.title: Magic Containers
magicContainers.description: Docker on bare-metal — ultra-fast CPUs, NVMe storage, AI autoscaling

storage.title: Storage
storage.description: Geo-replicated S3-compatible object storage with AES encryption

stream.title: Stream
stream.description: Video streaming with HLS/DASH, DRM, AI captions, 4K

optimizer.title: Optimizer
optimizer.description: Image optimization — WebP/AVIF, smart crop, Bunny Fonts

edgeScripting.title: Edge Scripting
edgeScripting.description: JS/TS at 100+ edge locations with Deno, sub-ms cold start

database.title: Database
database.description: Serverless globally-replicated SQLite with libSQL protocol

shield.title: Shield
shield.description: WAF, DDoS protection L3/4/7, bot detection, rate limiting

dns.title: DNS
dns.description: Scriptable DNS with GeoDNS, DNSSEC, ultra-low latency

fonts.title: Fonts
fonts.description: Privacy-friendly Google Fonts drop-in replacement, GDPR compliant

deploy.headline: Deploy
deploy.title: Magic Containers
deploy.description: Bun-powered Docker deployment on bunny.net bare-metal infrastructure

modules.headline: Ecosystem
modules.title: Modules & Integrations
modules.description: NuxtHub features & Nuxt Official modules powering this starter

unjs.headline: Foundation
unjs.title: UnJS Ecosystem
unjs.description: 12 UnJS packages built-in — the backbone of Nitro & Nuxt

pwa.headline: PWA
pwa.title: PWA Ready
pwa.description: Installable Progressive Web App with offline support via Workbox
pwa.scanQr: Scan the QR code or use your browser's install prompt to add this app to your device.
pwa.androidStep1: Tap ⋮ (menu) → "Install app" or "Add to Home screen"

cta.title: Ready to deploy?
cta.description: Clone this starter, configure your bunny.net services, and deploy your full-stack NuxtHub app in minutes.

ws.headline: Real-time
ws.title: WebSocket Demo
ws.description: Live WebSocket connection powered by crossws — broadcast messages in real-time

stream.headline: Video
stream.title: Bunny Stream
stream.description: Video streaming platform with global delivery, adaptive streaming, and robust security
stream.noConfig: Set NUXT_PUBLIC_BUNNY_STREAM_LIBRARY_ID and NUXT_PUBLIC_BUNNY_STREAM_VIDEO_ID in .env to enable the video player demo.

codeSnippets.headline: API Examples
codeSnippets.title: Shield · DNS · Edge Scripting
codeSnippets.description: Real API snippets for bunny.net security, DNS management, and edge computing — ready to integrate
